history.description: “Vikings” will return for a fourth season on the History Channel, the network’s EVP and general manager, Dirk Hoogstra, announced on Thursday. Five new episodes remain in the current season airing Thursdays, and the finale will air Apr. 23 in its regular 10 p.m. time slot. Production on the new seas
